passed: Every one of the 28 lessons is included
No lesson has zero hours (shared 0.25 h floor)
Every assessed lesson has weighted accuracy; unassessed lessons are unknown
Every lesson has a coverage level
Every lesson uses the calibrated rubric base-hour table
Unassessed lessons retain full calibrated base evidence before any course-budget allocation
One correct question is never treated as complete mastery
Raw component total equals raw lessons plus orientation and review
Unrounded final component total equals all final components
Every course-budget change is assigned to an explicit component
Actual components remain within 14-35 h
Reading & Writing is rounded upward to the next whole hour
Math is rounded upward to the next whole hour
Strategy time is rounded upward to the next whole hour
Final scheduled total equals rounded English, Math, and strategy totals
The individual 35-hour maximum is enforced after whole-hour section rounding
The individual 35-hour maximum is enforced on the final scheduled total

individual_results.final_interpretation: The diagnostic measures current evidence, not full potential. Strong performance reduces remediation but never removes SAT-specific teaching; weak performance increases guided instruction; limited coverage prevents unjustified reductions, and unassessed lessons are treated as unknown. Course-budget changes are assigned to explicit components. Lesson allocations retain two-decimal precision. Reading & Writing, Math, and strategy totals are each rounded upward to the next whole hour, and the final scheduled total is the sum of those three rounded categories. All hour figures are planning estimates and may be updated after instruction begins.

passed: Every one of the 28 lessons is included
No lesson has zero hours (shared 0.25 h floor)
Every assessed lesson has weighted accuracy; unassessed lessons are unknown
Every lesson has a coverage level
Every lesson uses the calibrated rubric base-hour table
Unassessed lessons retain full calibrated base evidence before any course-budget allocation
One correct question is never treated as complete mastery
Raw component total equals raw lessons plus orientation and review
Unrounded final component total equals all final components
Every course-budget change is assigned to an explicit component
Actual components remain within 14-35 h
Reading & Writing is rounded upward to the next whole hour
Math is rounded upward to the next whole hour
Strategy time is rounded upward to the next whole hour
Final scheduled total equals rounded English, Math, and strategy totals
The individual 35-hour maximum is enforced after whole-hour section rounding
The individual 35-hour maximum is enforced on the final scheduled total

individual_results.final_interpretation: The diagnostic measures current evidence, not full potential. Strong performance reduces remediation but never removes SAT-specific teaching; weak performance increases guided instruction; limited coverage prevents unjustified reductions, and unassessed lessons are treated as unknown. Course-budget changes are assigned to explicit components. Lesson allocations retain two-decimal precision. Reading & Writing, Math, and strategy totals are each rounded upward to the next whole hour, and the final scheduled total is the sum of those three rounded categories. All hour figures are planning estimates and may be updated after instruction begins.

Max individual need 1.53 h x (1 + 0.08 size + 0.15 diversity [highly different: hour range 0.89, accuracy range 70.6 pts]) = 1.88 h; retained without lesson-level rounding at 1.88 h.
Max individual need 0.32 h x (1 + 0.08 size + 0 diversity [very similar: hour range 0, accuracy range 0 pts]) = 0.35 h; retained without lesson-level rounding at 0.35 h.
Max individual need 1.53 h x (1 + 0.08 size + 0.15 diversity [highly different: hour range 0.89, accuracy range 100 pts]) = 1.88 h; retained without lesson-level rounding at 1.88 h.
Max individual need 0.64 h x (1 + 0.08 size + 0.15 diversity [highly different: hour range 0.32, accuracy range 100 pts]) = 0.79 h; retained without lesson-level rounding at 0.79 h.

split_reasons: 14 of 28 lessons (25%+) show highly different profiles
target scores span 1150-1420, which creates incompatible pacing

subgroup_recommendation.note: Composition is a starting suggestion based on total instructional need; refine it with lesson-level profiles, targets, and test dates. Also consider individual support sessions, office hours, optional remediation workshops, and differentiated homework.

constraint_notes: After group Reading & Writing, Math, and strategy totals were rounded upward to whole hours, actual common-core lesson/review components were reduced as needed so the scheduled group total remained within the configured maximum.

passed: Every student received an individual calculation first
Group lessons were calculated lesson by lesson (28 lessons)
Every core group lesson preserves the shared 0.25-hour minimum
Any individual need above common core is recorded as supplemental support
Group-size adjustment applied consistently
Raw group component total equals lessons plus initial orientation and review
Final group component total equals all final components
Actual group components remain within configured range
Group Reading & Writing is rounded upward to the next whole hour
Group Math is rounded upward to the next whole hour
Group strategy time is rounded upward to the next whole hour
Final group total equals rounded English, Math, and strategy totals
The group maximum is enforced after whole-hour section rounding
The group maximum is enforced on the final scheduled total

final_interpretation: Group hours are built lesson by lesson from individual needs, group size, and lesson-specific diversity. The common core is built from unrounded lesson allocations; group Reading & Writing, Math, and strategy totals are then rounded upward independently to whole hours and budgeted within the configured group minimum and maximum. Repetition above the core budget is moved to differentiated practice, while any remaining student-specific need is shown separately as subgroup or individual support rather than allowing the core total to exceed its maximum. Final hours remain planning estimates and may be updated after instruction begins.
